name: Synergia
author: TheMechanicalDJ
Potatotays & Marcourse
description: This mod adds 50 new Jokers, new Tarot and Spectral cards, and 2 new consumable types to Balatro. This Mod also adds new Seals, Enhancements, Editions, and plenty of other stuff to the game. Credit to Toby Fox, Scott Cawthon, and Justin Oval.
